---
title: "Week 2 — Control Flow & Functions"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 2 Overview

Master Python's control flow and build reusable functions. Covers conditionals, loops, list comprehensions, and lambda expressions.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | Conditionals & Loops | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Functions & Scope | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | List Comprehensions & Lambda | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
